name: Peerson Audio
message: Advantage Product Enterprise specializes in innovative rigging solutions for audio installations, offering products such as the APE Hanger, CHAIN Monkey, U Tube, and Bumper BoostPeerson Audio Incorporated specializes in designing and installing professional audio, video, and lighting systems tailored for a variety of clientele including houses of worship, sporting venues, performing arts venues, government buildings, and businesses.We will upload corporate data of the companies soon. Employee information, HR files, financials, customers info and a bit more.
